title: Prevent log injection attacks
description: Logging user input without proper sanitization can lead to log injection attacks where attackers inject malicious content into log files. This can corrupt logs, hide attack traces, or exploit log processing systems.
recommendation: Sanitize and validate all user input before including it in log messages.

noncompliant.description: Directly logging user input allows attackers to inject newlines, fake log entries, or malicious content into logs.

compliant.description: Sanitizing user input by removing/escaping special characters and using structured logging prevents log injection attacks.

checks.message: Logging user input without sanitization can lead to log injection attacks
